title: New Databricks JDBC Driver is open source
body: The new [Databricks JDBC Driver](/aws/en/integrations/jdbc-oss) is now open source. The [source code](https://github.com/databricks/databricks-jdbc) is publicly available under the [Apache 2.0 license](https://github.com/databricks/databricks-jdbc/blob/main/LICENSE). Community contributions are welcome. See the [Contribution Guidelines](https://github.com/databricks/databricks-jdbc/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md).
